[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian market trended softer through most of the week, and despite the
introduction of new import duties the overall tone remained weak; however, towards
the very end of the week we began to see early signs of stability and a slight
improvement in sentiment. Recyclers remain bullish on the medium-term outlook, despite the current softness. While buyer demand is present, there has been a clear dearth of tonnage coming into
the market, which has been a key
